description: Environment setup - install dependencies, run existing tests, confirm baseline is green
steps: Run pyenv shell 3.11.14 to use Python 3.11
Install the project in editable mode: pip install -e '.[gui,dev]'
Install additional test dependencies that will be needed: pip install pytest-qt pytest-cov keyring
Run pytest -q and confirm all existing 65 tests pass
Install mesa-libGL and other Qt runtime dependencies for headless GUI tests
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q passes all existing tests (65 tests)
findings: All 65 tests pass (pytest -q, 0.56s). Python 3.11.15 used (pyenv). Required system packages: mesa-libGL, mesa-libEGL, libxkbcommon, dbus-libs. QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen needed for headless Qt. pytest-qt triggers QtGui import at configure time so dbus-libs is required even for non-GUI tests.
